title: RSW 6 Santa & Elf 6" Crackers – Fun Christmas Crackers with Santa and Elf Designs – Includes Hats, Mottos & Festive Gifts
features: BOX OF 6 FAMILY CRACKERS – Six 6-inch crackers featuring Santa, elf and starry snowflake designs
BRIGHT FESTIVE DESIGNS – Printed on navy and white boards with silver curling ribbon for a cheerful look
FUN CONTENTS – Each cracker includes a paper hat, motto and novelty gift to delight your guests
PERFECT FOR CHRISTMAS CELEBRATIONS – Great for family dinners, parties and festive gatherings
RECYCLABLE MATERIALS – Crackers and packaging are fully recyclable for a more sustainable Christmas
description: Bring extra cheer to your Christmas table with the RSW 6 Santa & Elf 6" Crackers. This pack of twelve features a mix of Santa Claus and cheeky elf designs, along with star and snowflake patterns on navy and white boards, tied with silver curling ribbon. Their bright, colourful look makes them a perfect choice for family gatherings, adding a touch of magic to your Christmas meal. Each cracker includes a paper hat, a festive motto and a novelty gift, offering entertainment for children and adults alike. Their 10-inch size makes them ideal for smaller tables while still standing out as a joyful part of your table décor. Made with recyclable materials, these crackers are a more sustainable choice for your celebrations. Whether for Christmas Day, Boxing Day or seasonal parties, they bring festive fun and laughter to every occasion. WARNING! DO NOT PULL INNER OUTSIDE PARTY CRACKER. PULL CRACKER AWAY FROM FACE. DO NOT PULL NEAR EYES OR EARS. PULL BOTH ENDS AT ARMS LENGTH FIRMLY AND SHARPLY. DO NOT REMOVE INNER. WARNING! Not suitable for children under 3 years due to small parts which could represent a choking hazard. Contents may include glass and items with functional sharp points or edges. Adult supervision is required. Items may fall from crackers whilst pulling.
